name: math-demo-monorepo
description: 数学试卷解析系统 - Monorepo

scripts.dev: node scripts/prep-dev.mjs && concurrently "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:parser"
scripts.build:convert-equations: dotnet restore tools/latexToMathType/ensure-net48-ref/ensure-net48-ref.csproj --source https://repo.huaweicloud.com/repository/nuget/v3/index.json --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json && dotnet restore tools/latexToMathType/ensure-office-interop/ensure-office-interop.csproj --source https://repo.huaweicloud.com/repository/nuget/v3/index.json --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json && dotnet msbuild tools/latexToMathType/ConvertEquations/ConvertEquations.sln -p:Configuration=Release -p:Platform="Any CPU"
scripts.build:convert-equations:nuget-org: dotnet restore tools/latexToMathType/ensure-net48-ref/ensure-net48-ref.csproj --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json && dotnet restore tools/latexToMathType/ensure-office-interop/ensure-office-interop.csproj --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json && dotnet msbuild tools/latexToMathType/ConvertEquations/ConvertEquations.sln -p:Configuration=Release -p:Platform="Any CPU"
